name: Order Entry / CPRS
description: Clinical orders, quick orders, order checks, order sets

items.name: ORQQAL LIST
items.description: Returns a list of allergies for a patient.

items.name: ORQQAL DETAIL
items.description: This function returns a string of information for a specific allergy/ adverse reaction.  Returned data is delimited by "^" and includes: allergen/reactant, originator, originator title, verified/not verified,  observed/historical,<blank>,type, observation date, severity, drug class,  symptoms/reacti

items.name: ORQQPL LIST
items.description: Function returns a list of problems for a patient.

items.name: ORQQPL DETAIL
items.description: Function returns a string of detailed information for a problem.

items.name: ORQQXQA PATIENT
items.description: Function returns a list of notifications for a patient for the current user.

items.name: ORQQXQA USER
items.description: Function returns notifications for current user.

items.name: ORQQVI VITALS
items.description: Array of patient most recent vitals within start and stop date/times.  If no start and stop dates are indicated, the most recent are returned.   If no start date is passed then the start date is 1 (i.e. before any dates).   If no stop date is passed then the start date is also the stop date and if t

items.name: ORQPT DEFAULT PATIENT LIST
items.description: Function returns the current user's default patient list.

items.name: ORQPT PROVIDERS
items.description: Function returns an array of providers.

items.name: ORQPT PROVIDER PATIENTS
items.description: Function returns an array of patients linked to a provider/user.

items.name: ORQPT CLINIC PATIENTS
items.description: Returns patients with appointments at a clinic between start and stop dates

items.name: ORQPT SPECIALTIES
items.description: Function returns an array of treating specialties.

items.name: ORQPT SPECIALTY PATIENTS
items.description: Function returns an array of patients linked to a treating specialty.

items.name: ORQPT TEAMS
items.description: Function returns a list of teams.

items.name: ORQPT TEAM PATIENTS
items.description: Function returns an array of patients on a team.

items.name: ORQPT WARD PATIENTS
items.description: Function returns a list of patients on a ward.

items.name: ORQPT CLINICS
items.description: Function returns a list of clinics.

items.name: ORQQPS LIST
items.description: Function returns a list of a patient's medications.

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP STRING
items.description: This function returns a string of follow-up data.  Content of the data  varies by notification.

items.name: ORB DELETE ALERT
items.description: This function deletes an alert.

items.name: ORQPT WARDS
items.description: Function returns a list of wards.

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP TYPE
items.description: Returns the follow-up action type for a notification as identified via the alert xqaid.

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP ARRAY
items.description: This function returns an array of follow-up data.  Content of the data varies by notification.

items.name: ORQOR DETAIL
items.description: Returns detailed information regarding an order.

items.name: ORQPT DEFAULT LIST SOURCE
items.description: Function returns the source of the current user's default patient list.

items.name: ORWPT ID INFO
items.description: Returns identifying information for a patient.

items.name: ORWPT LIST ALL
items.description: Returns a set of patient names for use with a long list box.

items.name: ORWUH POPUP
items.description: Retrieves the "What's This" text for a given control.

items.name: ORWLR CUMULATIVE REPORT
items.description: This call returns an up to date laboratory cumulative report for a given  patient.

items.name: ORQQVS VISITS/APPTS
items.description: Returns a list of patient appointments and visits for a date/time range. location.

items.name: ORQQPP LIST
items.description: Returns a list of active Patient Postings for a patient.

items.name: ORQPT WARDRMBED
items.description: Returns the ward, room-bed for a patient.

items.name: ORQQPX IMMUN LIST
items.description: Returns a list of patient immunizations.

items.name: ORQOR LIST
items.description: Returns a list of patient orders.

items.name: ORQQLR DETAIL
items.description: Returns the details of a lab order.

items.name: ORQQVS DETAIL NOTES
items.description: Returns the progress notes based on patient and visit identifier.

items.name: ORQQVS DETAIL SUMMARY
items.description: Returns discharge summary for a visit.

items.name: ORQQPS DETAIL
items.description: Returns the details of a medication order.

items.name: ORB SORT METHOD
items.description: Returns the default sort method for notification display based on the  precedence USER, DIVISION, SYSTEM, PACKAGE.

items.name: ORQQXMB MAIL GROUPS
items.description: Returns mail groups in a system.

items.name: ORQPT ATTENDING/PRIMARY
items.description: Returns a patient's attending physician and primary provider.

items.name: ORWD DEF
items.description: Returns the formatting definition for an ordering dialog from the ORDER DIALOG file (101.41).

items.name: ORQ NULL LIST
items.description: Returns a null list.

items.name: ORQQLR SEARCH RANGE OUTPT
items.description: Returns the date search range in number of days (e.g. 90) to begin the  search before today.  For example, a value of 90 would indicate to limit the search between ninety day. Limited to Outpatients.

items.name: ORQQAL LIST REPORT
items.description: Returns a list of allergens, severity and signs/symptoms in a report format which can be used in a "detailed" display.  This RPC was set up to support the listing of allergies when selected from the Patient Postings list.

items.name: ORWORR GET
items.description: Returns a list of orders & and associated fields and text.

items.name: ORWU USERINFO
items.description: Returns preferences for the current user.

items.name: ORWD SAVE
items.description: Saves an order.  The order is passed in ORDIALOG format.

items.name: ORWD SIGN
items.description: Changes signature status on a list of orders and optionally releases the orders to their respective services.

items.name: ORWD OI
items.description: Returns a group of orderable items to be used in the OnNeedData event for a long list box.

items.description: Returns a list of allergies for a patient.

items.name: ORQQAL LIST REPORT
items.description: Returns a list of allergens, severity and signs/symptoms in a report format which can be used in a "detailed" display.  This RPC was set up to support the listing of allergies when selected from the Patient Postings list.

items.name: ORQPT PATIENT TEAM PROVIDERS
items.description: Function returns a list of providers linked to a patient via teams.

items.name: ORQQPL PROBLEM LIST
items.description: Problem list for CPRS GUI client

items.name: ORQQPL USER PROB CATS
items.description: rETURNS ARRAY OF CATEGORIES FOR USER TO SELECT FROM

items.name: ORQQPL USER PROB LIST
items.description: Returns array of user specific problems to select from

items.name: ORQQPL PROBLEM LEX SEARCH
items.description: Get a list from clinical lexicon for display in list or combo box

items.name: ORQQPL EDIT LOAD
items.description: Return array of default fields and original fields - GMPFLD() and GMPORIG()

items.name: ORQQPL INIT PT
items.description: returns death indicator, sc and exposures

items.name: ORQQPL PROVIDER LIST
items.description: RETURNS ARRAY OF PROVIDERS MATCHING INPUT

items.name: ORQQPL EDIT SAVE
items.description: sAVES EDITED PROBLEM RECORD

items.name: ORQQPL CLIN SRCH
items.description: Returns list of clinics for problem list. Should be replaced by CLIN^ORQPT

items.name: ORQQPL ADD SAVE
items.description: Add new problem record

items.name: ORQQPL INIT USER
items.description: Returns user parameters for problem list

items.name: ORQQPL UPDATE
items.description: Updates problem record

items.name: ORQQPL DELETE
items.description: DELETES A PROBLEM

items.name: ORQQPL AUDIT HIST
items.description: RETURN PROBLEM AUDIT HISTORY

items.name: ORWPT ID INFO
items.description: Returns identifying information for a patient.

items.name: ORWPT LIST ALL
items.description: Returns a set of patient names for use with a long list box.

items.name: ORWUH POPUP
items.description: Retrieves the "What's This" text for a given control.

items.name: ORWLR CUMULATIVE REPORT
items.description: This call returns an up to date laboratory cumulative report for a given  patient.

items.name: ORWD DEF
items.description: Returns the formatting definition for an ordering dialog from the ORDER DIALOG file (101.41).

items.name: ORWORR GET
items.description: Returns a list of orders & and associated fields and text.

items.name: ORWU USERINFO
items.description: Returns preferences for the current user.

items.name: ORWD SAVE
items.description: Saves an order.  The order is passed in ORDIALOG format.

items.name: ORWD SIGN
items.description: Changes signature status on a list of orders and optionally releases the orders to their respective services.

items.name: ORWD OI
items.description: Returns a group of orderable items to be used in the OnNeedData event for a long list box.

items.name: ORWDLR DEF
items.description: Loads dialog data (lists & defaults) for a lab order.

items.name: ORWDLR LOAD
items.description: Loads sample, specimen, and urgency information for a given lab test.

items.name: ORWDLR ABBSPEC
items.description: Returns lab specimens that have an abbreviation (used as default list).

items.name: ORWDLR ALLSAMP
items.description: Returns a list of collection samples for a lab order.

items.name: ORWDLR OIPARAM
items.description: No longer used.

items.name: ORWU VALIDSIG
items.description: Validates a broker encrypted electronic signature.

items.name: ORWPT APPTLST
items.description: Returns a list of appointments for a patient (for visit selection).

items.name: ORWU HOSPLOC
items.description: Returns a set of hospital locations for use in a long list box.

items.name: ORWPT ADMITLST
items.description: Returns a list of admissions for a patient (for visit selection).

items.name: ORWD FORMID
items.description: Returns the Form ID (mapping to a windows form) for an ordering dialog.

items.name: ORWD GET4EDIT
items.description: Returns the responses for an already existing order.

items.name: ORWD VALIDACT
items.description: Returns 1 if action is valid for an order, otherwise 0^error.

items.name: ORWD SAVEACT
items.description: Saves the action on a order in an unsigned/unreleased state.

items.name: ORWD DT
items.description: Returns a date in internal Fileman format.

items.name: ORWDCSLT LOOK200
items.description: Validates Attn: field of a consult order.

items.name: ORWDCSLT DEF
items.description: Load dialog data (lists & defaults) for a consult order. (16-BIT)

items.name: ORWD PROVKEY
items.description: Returns 1 if the users possesses the PROVIDER key.

items.name: ORWDGX LOAD
items.description: Loads a list of activities for an activity order.

items.name: ORWDPS LOAD
items.description: Loads dialog data (lists & defaults) for a pharmacy order once an orderable item (Drug & Form) is selected.

items.name: ORWDRA DEF
items.description: Loads dialog data (lists & defaults) for a radiology order.

items.name: ORWDGX VMDEF
items.description: Loads dialog data (lists & defaults) for a vitals order.

items.name: ORWDPS DEF
items.description: Loads dialog data (lists & defaults) for a pharmacy order (inpatient and outpatient).

items.name: ORWDLR STOP
items.description: Calculates a stop date (for lab orders with schedules).

items.name: ORWU NEWPERS
items.description: Returns a set of New Person file entries for use in a long list box.

items.name: ORWU DEVICE
items.description: Returns a list of print devices.

items.name: ORWRA IMAGING EXAMS
items.description: This remote procedure call returns a list on imaging exams for a specific patient.

items.name: ORWRA REPORT TEXT
items.description: This remote procedure call returns an array containing a formattied imaging report. This array matches exactly the report format on the roll 'n scroll version of CPRS.

items.name: ORWRP REPORT LISTS
items.description: This remote procedure call returns a list of reports, Health Summary types and date ranges that can be displayed at the workstation. There are no input parameters fo this rpc.

items.name: ORWRP REPORT TEXT
items.description: This rpc retrieves the report text for a report selected on the Report tab. the report format on the roll 'n scroll version of CPRS.

items.name: ORWRP PRINT REPORT
items.description: This rpc is used to print a report on the Report tab in CPRS.

items.name: ORWLR REPORT LISTS
items.description: This remote procedure call returns a list of lab cumulative sections, and date ranges that can be displayed at the workstation. There are no input parameters fo this rpc.

items.name: ORWLR CUMULATIVE SECTION
items.description: This rpc retrieves the part of the lab cumulative report  selected by the user on the Labs tab.

items.name: ORWRA PRINT REPORT
items.description: This rpc is used to print an imaging report on the Imaging tab in CPRS.

items.name: ORWDPS INPT
items.description: Checks restrictions for entering inpatient meds.  If no restrictions, a 0 is returned.  If there is a restriction, it is returned in the format:      1^restriction text

items.name: ORWDPS OUTPT
items.description: Checks restrictions for entering outpatient meds.  If no restrictions, a 0 is returned.  If there is a restriction, it is returned in the format:      1^restriction text

items.name: ORWCS LIST OF CONSULT REPORTS
items.description: This remote procedure call returns a list on consult reports for a specific patient.

items.name: ORWCS REPORT TEXT
items.description: This remote procedure call returns an array containing a formattied consult report. This array matches exactly the report format on the roll 'n scroll version of CPRS.

items.name: ORWCS PRINT REPORT
items.description: This rpc is used to print a consult report on the Consult tab in CPRS.

items.name: ORWD KEY
items.description: RPC which receives a key name and returns a 1 if the user holds the key, otherwise a 0 is returned.

items.name: ORWPT LAST5
items.description: Returns a list of patients matching the string of Last Name Initial_Last 4 SSN (Initial/Last 4 look-up to PATIENT file).

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP STRING
items.description: This function returns a string of follow-up data.  Content of the data  varies by notification.

items.name: ORB DELETE ALERT
items.description: This function deletes an alert.

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP TYPE
items.description: Returns the follow-up action type for a notification as identified via the alert xqaid.

items.name: ORB FOLLOW-UP ARRAY
items.description: This function returns an array of follow-up data.  Content of the data varies by notification.

items.name: ORB SORT METHOD
items.description: Returns the default sort method for notification display based on the  precedence USER, DIVISION, SYSTEM, PACKAGE.

items.name: ORB FORWARD ALERT
items.description: The rpc forwards an alert.

items.name: ORB RENEW ALERT
items.description: This rpc renews an alert.

items.name: ORBCMA5 LOCK
items.description: Due to issues with LOCKing between the CPRS GUI chart and the  BCMAOrderCom dll, some changes are necessary to how locks are handled  when locking the patient chart.   Using the $J value for the CPRS GUI session, the CPRS GUI will call the  BCMAOrderCom dll and pass in the $J value and this value is

items.name: ORBCMA5 JOB
items.description: Due to issues with LOCKing between the CPRS GUI chart and the  BCMAOrderCom dll, some changes are necessary to how locks are handled  when locking the patient chart.   In order to facility those changes, the CPRS GUI chart needs to know the  $J value for the running process for the open connection o

items.name: ORB3UTL DEFER
items.description: allows to defer an alert DEFER(ORY,ORPROV,ORALERT,ORDT)  ;defer an alert         ;ORALERT - alert to defer         ;ORPROV - provider to defer the alert for         ;ORDT - date/time to defer the alert until

items.name: ORB3UTL NOTIFPG
items.description: NOTIFPG(ORY,ORPAT,ORPG) ;page through a patients alerts         ;ORPAT - patient DFN         ;ORPG - page to get

items.name: ORB3UTL GET NOTIFICATION
items.description: Returns the entire notificaiton entry as a name=value set.
